# Terra Invicta Companion — Copilot Project Instructions

This file is loaded by GitHub Copilot on every request in this workspace.

## Read first

Read `AGENTS.md` before acting on any request involving code, files, or architecture. `AGENTS.md` contains the process rules, role boundaries, branch rules, and workflow. They are non-negotiable.

## Branch rule

`main` is protected. All work happens on `feature/<slug>` branches. No agent commits to `main`. No agent merges into `main`.
